geography.data_source: GHMC outer boundary + HMDA (Hyderabad Metropolitan Development Authority) growth corridor zones, Medchal-Malkajgiri district fringe

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Medchal-Malkajgiri/Sangareddy district fringe tables, rapid growth estimated at 6.2% CAGR from HMDA growth corridor data

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Telangana peri-urban tables, Census 2011 village-level data for HMDA fringe, PLFS 2022-23

commute_profile.data_source: TSRTC outer route data, no metro coverage in peri-urban zone, very long commutes into Hyderabad core, CMP Hyderabad 2013 fringe area data

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from low-income peri-urban zone, highest fare sensitivity in Hyderabad due to long commutes on low incomes, very slow information diffusion in sprawl

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from peri-urban social patterns, village-origin kinship networks, very low tier2 density in underserved growth corridor

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from highway junction market activity in peri-urban fringe
Estimated from construction labour gathering points on arterial roads in HMDA growth corridor

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Periurban/Low Connectivity template from AGENT_SPEC.md, directly applicable to outer Hyderabad growth corridor

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from peri-urban governance — mix of GHMC fringe and panchayat, labour contractor presence for construction
